notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: José Ramírez steals (23) 2nd base. José Ramírez to 3rd. José Ramírez advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Kyle Higashioka.

notableEvents.label: Patrick Bailey reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Patrick Bailey reaches on a throwing error by pitcher Luis Curvelo. Steven Kwan to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Josh Jung GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Jung grounds into a double play, third baseman José Ramírez to second baseman Travis Bazzana to first baseman Kyle Manzardo. Corey Seager out at 2nd. Josh Jung out at 1st.
